title: pitcairnia devansayana
intro: Pitcairnia devansayana, also known as the 'Queen's Tears', is a species of plant in the family Bromeliaceae. This terrestrial bromeliad is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which contribute to its health benefits such as wound healing and immune system support. Pitcairnia devansayana is often used in herbal preparations, including teas and tinctures, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
